name: Black Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, combine 1 can of undrained black beans and water. Blend at high speed until smooth.
2. Heat a medium nonstick saucepan sprayed with Pam.
3. Add the finely chopped onion and minced garlic to the saucepan. Cook until they are crisp tender.
4. Pour in the pureed bean mixture from the food processor and add the remaining drained black beans, ground red pepper, and cumin.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil.
6. Serve topped with yogurt and chopped tomato.
